positive: A stylized, intricate illustration of bioluminescent deep-sea flora and whimsical geometric sea creatures, set against a dark, cosmic midnight blue background. The composition must be perfectly circular and centered, featuring swirling vortex lines and clean, strong silhouettes. Use highly contrasting, neon cyan, electric lavender, and vibrant teal colors. The art style should resemble detailed linework etching combined with ethereal, glowing watercolor gradients, suitable for repeating print artwork. Focus on clean lines and high contrast for maximum visual pop on fabric.
negative: low quality, jpeg artifacts, blurry, noise, signature, watermark, text, typography, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, tiling, cropped, cartoon, photorealistic, messy, grainy
